title: Point Reyes Light — November 4, 2004 (Page 10)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated November 4, 2004, Page 10. This posthumous issue may contain coverage related to PKD's literary legacy, film or television adaptations, or community items connected to his former residence in the Point Reyes area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, November 4, 2004, page 10. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 4, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

By 2004, multiple film adaptations of Dick's work had been produced (Blade Runner, Total Recall, Minority Report, Paycheck), and Dick's name had become widely recognized in mainstream culture. This clipping from the western Marin County newspaper continues the archive's documentation of Dick's former community. The specific content remains to be determined through examination of the scanned image.
